description: A university mental health Digital Twin platform that monitors, predicts, and supports student emotional wellbeing. It integrates real-time alerts, AI-driven stress predictions, a counselor portal, and an interactive 3D digital twin brain visualization.
archetype: Archetype 1 (Organic & Earthy) adapted to Dark Theme (Clinical but Warm). The interface fuses clinical healthcare precision with modern SaaS aesthetics. It uses deep oceanic/slate tones combined with trusting Teal and organic Amber to avoid the cold, intimidating feel of standard tech dashboards.

rules: Headings must use Outfit. DO NOT use Inter for any headings.
Use wide tracking for small overlines/labels (tracking-[0.2em]).
Tint all grays with slate/blue for a cool, calming clinical backdrop.
Never use pure black (#000000) or pure white (#FFFFFF).
Use Teal (#0D9488) primarily for key actions, progress, and healthy status.
Use Amber (#F59E0B) for 24-hour predictions, burnout risk, and moderate alerts.
Ensure 4.5:1 minimum contrast for normal text and 3:1 for large text against dark backgrounds.

grid_system.dashboard: MODE B: THE 'CONTROL ROOM' GRID. Tight gaps (gap-4 or gap-6). Use col-span-1 for summary metrics, col-span-2 or 3 for 24-hr prediction charts, and a large central span for the Digital Twin Brain Visualization.
grid_system.landing_page: MODE A: THE 'TETRIS' GRID. Wide gaps (gap-8 to gap-12). Asymmetrical bento layouts showcasing platform features.

spacing_rules: Generous Spacing Philosophy: Containers with borders MUST have internal padding (p-6 or p-8).
Never center everything; left-align dense data, labels, and forms.
Ensure responsive heights. Do not let images or visualizations exceed 80vh on mobile.

surfaces.cards: Flat solid backgrounds (bg-slate-900) with subtle 1px inner borders (border-white/10). DO NOT use glassmorphism for medical/health data panels to prevent visual refraction of crucial data.
surfaces.headers: Solid background with a hard bottom border if content cuts off. Use backdrop-blur-xl bg-slate-900/80 only for sticky navigation.
surfaces.footers: Dark background, massive spacing (py-24), large typography for the final CTA.

interactions.buttons: Flat colors. Primary: bg-teal-600 text-white hover:bg-teal-700. Secondary: bg-slate-800 text-slate-200 hover:bg-slate-700. Add focus:ring-2 focus:ring-teal-500 focus:ring-offset-2 focus:ring-offset-slate-900.
interactions.inputs: Use Shadcn customized components. Flat, rectangular, rounded-md, subtle border.

visualizations.digital_twin_brain: Centerpiece 3D visualization. Use React Three Fiber (@react-three/fiber) with a custom particle geometry or react-force-graph-3d. Render glowing teal and amber nodes to represent the brain on a transparent or dark slate canvas. Surround it with 4 overlay floating panels (State Mirror, Simulation Engine, Treatment Tester, Trajectory Recorder).
visualizations.charts: Use Recharts. Smooth area charts with gradient fills (Teal for positive trajectory, Amber for burnout risk/stress). Hide axis lines, use subtle dotted grid lines.

rules: Micro-interactions: Subtle scale (-translate-y-1) and shadow updates on dashboard widgets on hover.
Must explicitly set text color on hover (e.g., hover:bg-teal-600 hover:text-white).
Use Framer Motion for layout transitions and stagger effects on the dashboard metrics.

hero_background.description: Abstract glowing brain network. Use as a background for the landing page hero or onboarding wizard with a heavy overlay (bg-slate-900/80).

student_hero.description: Student studying in a dark room. Use for student-facing landing page sections.

counselor_avatar_1.description: Professional therapist portrait. Use in the counselor portal and therapy appointment UI.

music_therapy_cover_1.description: Abstract dark sound waves. Use for the music therapy player album cover.

music_therapy_cover_2.description: Calm lo-fi aesthetic image. Use for music therapy player variations.

instructions_to_main_agent: Initialize Tailwind config with the custom colors: slate (slate-900 as main bg), teal-600 (#0D9488), and amber-500 (#F59E0B). Ensure dark mode is explicitly forced or set as default.
Install critical UI libraries: lucide-react (fallback), @phosphor-icons/react (primary), recharts, and framer-motion.
Student Dashboard Layout: Implement a dense 'Control Room' Bento Grid. Top row: 6 metric cards (Stress, Fatigue, Emotional Stability, Cognitive Load, Burnout Risk, Crisis Risk).
Real-time Alert System: Implement 3 severity tiers using colors (Green/Teal for low, Amber for moderate risk/burnout, Red for crisis). Ensure high accessibility contrast for these alerts.

3D Brain Visualization Centerpiece: Use @react-three/fiber and three to create a floating brain graphic. If too complex, use react-force-graph-3d configured to look like neural networks with glowing teal/amber particles. Surround the 3D canvas with 4 interactive UI modules (State Mirror, Simulation Engine, Treatment Tester, Trajectory Recorder).
Music Therapy Player: Build a sticky or fixed widget at the bottom or side of the dashboard, using the provided abstract sound wave covers.
Counselor & Admin Analytics: Use Recharts for trend analysis, rendering smooth area charts and progress bars.
CRITICAL: DO NOT use 'Inter' for headings. Configure Google Fonts to import 'Outfit' for all headings and 'Inter' for body text.
CRITICAL: Every interactive element (buttons, tabs, inputs, alert dismissals, nav links) MUST have a 'data-testid' attribute using kebab-case (e.g., data-testid='music-player-play-btn').
NEVER use placeholder images. Map the provided URLs exactly for all visuals.
